servers.name: CentOS2

HOSTNAME=RedApple2
OS=CentOS Linux 7 (Core)
KERNEL=3.10.0-1160.el7.x86_64

dbus.service
firewalld.service
getty@tty1.service
irqbalance.service
lvm2-lvmetad.service
NetworkManager.service
polkit.service
postfix.service
rsyslog.service
sshd.service
systemd-journald.service
systemd-logind.service
systemd-udevd.service
tuned.service
vgauthd.service
vmtoolsd.service
RUNNING_SERVICES_END
